mapper.select: /* StandardDisplayCategoryConnectQueryRepository.selectConnectList */ SELECT PSCDI.STD_CTG_NO , (SELECT PDCBM_LRG.DISP_CTG_NM || COALESCE(' > ' || PDCBM_MID.DISP_CTG_NM, '') || COALESCE(' > ' || PDCBM_SML.DISP_CTG_NM, '') || COALESCE(' > ' || PDCBM_THN.DISP_CTG_NM, '') FROM PR_DISP_CTG_BASE PDCB1 LEFT OUTER JOIN PR_DISP_CTG_BASE_ML PDCBM_LRG ON PDCB1.LRG_CTG_NO = PDCBM_LRG.DISP_CTG_NO AND PDCBM_LRG.LANG_CD = 'ko' LEFT OUTER JOIN PR_DISP_CTG_BASE_ML PDCBM_MID ON PDCB1.MID_CTG_NO = PDCBM_MID.DISP_CTG_NO AND PDCBM_MID.LANG_CD = 'ko' LEFT OUTER JOIN PR_DISP_CTG_BASE_ML PDCBM_SML ON PDCB1.SML_CTG_NO = PDCBM_SML.DISP_CTG_NO AND PDCBM_SML.LANG_CD = 'ko' LEFT OUTER JOIN PR_DISP_CTG_BASE_ML PDCBM_THN ON PDCB1.THN_CTG_NO = PDCBM_THN.DISP_CTG_NO AND PDCBM_THN.LANG_CD = 'ko' WHERE PDCB1.DISP_CTG_NO = PSCDI.DISP_CTG_NO ) AS DISP_CTG_NM , PSCDI.DISP_CTG_NO , PSCDI.REP_CTG_YN , PSCDI.USE_YN , PSCDI.SITE_NO , CSB.SITE_NM , PSCDI.DPML_NO , PDB.DPML_NM , PSCDI.SYS_MOD_ID , TO_CHAR(PSCDI.SYS_MOD_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS SYS_MOD_DTM FROM PR_STD_CTG_DISP_INFO PSCDI JOIN PR_DISP_CTG_BASE PDCB ON PSCDI.DISP_CTG_NO = PDCB.DISP_CTG_NO JOIN CC_SITE_BASE CSB ON PSCDI.SITE_NO = CSB.SITE_NO JOIN PR_DPML_BASE PDB ON PSCDI.DPML_NO = PDB.DPML_NO WHERE PSCDI.STD_CTG_NO = #{stdCtgNo} AND PSCDI.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY PSCDI.SITE_NO, PSCDI.DPML_NO, PSCDI.REP_CTG_YN DESC, PSCDI.DISP_CTG_NO
